title: pilosella lithuanica
intro: Pilosella lithuanica, also known as Lithuanian mouse-ear hawk's-beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family, native to Eastern Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pilosella lithuanica include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. Pilosella lithuanica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
